description: VERIFIED LIVE: Reuters via content-script DOM extraction — no login, no API key. Reuters tags each story link with data-testid="TitleLink", so this tool reads the headlines straight from the DOM of your open Reuters tab. Navigate the tab to reuters.com or any section (/world, /business, /technology, …) and call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code on /world: 20 stories with headline and article url extracted correctly.

tools.name: reuters_headlines
tools.description: Story links on the current Reuters page (reuters.com or any section/topic). Navigate the tab there first. Returns each story's headline and article url. VERIFIED (20 stories).
